summary: Hosea uses the metaphor of a broken marriage to illustrate Israel’s unfaithfulness to God and the persistent love that seeks restoration.
historical_context: Hosea prophesied to the northern kingdom during its moral and political decline before the Assyrian conquest.

mirror_water_fire.mirror: Israel sees its betrayal reflected in Hosea’s marriage.
mirror_water_fire.water: Calls to repentance cleanse covenant infidelity.
mirror_water_fire.fire: Love transforms judgment into the promise of restoration.
